_meta.description: Comic series (Mature line). Canonical source of truth. Synopses marked draft:true are placeholder copy drafted from cover art pending client-approved text.

series.title: I Ride for Them
series.tagline: In a city that sold its future, one woman rides for the ones who have none.
series.synopsis: In a near-future metropolis run on data and desperation, a nurse named Joy moves through the neon underlayer of the city carrying a secret worth more than her life. When the powerful come for the children no one else will protect, Joy becomes the only thing standing between them and the dark. A cinematic sci-fi thriller about sacrifice, motherhood, and the price of doing what's right.

cover.alt: I Ride for Them #1 cover art by Giulia Gualazzi: a woman in scrubs cradles an infant while holding a pistol against a neon city.

issues.title: I Ride for Them #1
issues.synopsis: The first issue introduces Joy and the city that made her — and the impossible choice that sets everything in motion.

cover.alt: I Ride for Them #1 cover by Giulia Gualazzi.

issues.title: I Ride for Them #2
issues.synopsis: Hunted and haunted, Joy confronts the reflection of who she was — and decides who she must become.

cover.alt: I Ride for Them #2 cover by Giulia Gualazzi: Joy at a sink facing a ghostly reflection.

series.title: Society of Killers
series.tagline: They're going to make you an offer you should refuse.
series.synopsis: A secret order of assassins operates in the shadows behind every city, bound by ritual, rivalry, and a code written in blood. When an invitation arrives — a single red card — refusing it may be the most dangerous thing you ever do. A stylish, noir-soaked descent into a world of elegant, monstrous killers.

cover.alt: Society of Killers #1 cover: a gentleman in a bowler hat extends a red calling card across a desk.

issues.title: Society of Killers #1
issues.synopsis: An offer is extended. A red card changes hands. The Society opens its doors — and they do not close.

cover.alt: Society of Killers #1 cover by Giulia Gualazzi.

issues.title: Society of Killers #2
issues.synopsis: The players are revealed. In a gathering of the Society's deadliest members, allegiance is the only currency — and betrayal, the only certainty.

cover.alt: Society of Killers #2 cover: an ensemble of stylish, armed assassins.
